'''thochakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:readdicting|readdicting]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readdicting|readdicting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thochakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thochakithi|thochakithi]] || [[word:thochakiji|thochakiji]] || [[word:thochakishi|thochakishi]] || [[word:thochakiki|thochakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thochakuthuthu|thochakuthuthu]] || [[word:thochakujuju|thochakujuju]] || [[word:thochakushushu|thochakushushu]] || [[word:thochakukuku|thochakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochakuthu|thochakuthu]] || [[word:thochakuju|thochakuju]] || [[word:thochakushu|thochakushu]] || [[word:thochakuku|thochakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochakufthuf|thochakufthuf]] || [[word:thochakufjuf|thochakufjuf]] || [[word:thochakufshuf|thochakufshuf]] || [[word:thochakufkuf|thochakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thochakethe|thochakethe]] || [[word:thochakeje|thochakeje]] || [[word:thochakeshe|thochakeshe]] || [[word:thochakeke|thochakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thochakothotho|thochakothotho]] || [[word:thochakojojo|thochakojojo]] || [[word:thochakoshosho|thochakoshosho]] || [[word:thochakokoko|thochakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochakotho|thochakotho]] || [[word:thochakojo|thochakojo]] || [[word:thochakosho|thochakosho]] || [[word:thochakoko|thochakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochakofthof|thochakofthof]] || [[word:thochakofjof|thochakofjof]] || [[word:thochakofshof|thochakofshof]] || [[word:thochakofkof|thochakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfthĂŻf|thochakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfjĂŻf|thochakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfshĂŻf|thochakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfkĂŻf|thochakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thochakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thochakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thochakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thochakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfthĂŻf|thochakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfjĂŻf|thochakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfshĂŻf|thochakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfkĂŻf|thochakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfthĂŻf|thochakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfjĂŻf|thochakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfshĂŻf|thochakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thochakĂŻfkĂŻf|thochakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thochakĂŠthĂŠ|thochakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thochakĂŠjĂŠ|thochakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thochakĂŠshĂŠ|thochakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thochakĂŠkĂŠ|thochakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thochakathatha|thochakathatha]] || [[word:thochakajaja|thochakajaja]] || [[word:thochakashasha|thochakashasha]] || [[word:thochakakaka|thochakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochakatha|thochakatha]] || [[word:thochakaja|thochakaja]] || [[word:thochakasha|thochakasha]] || [[word:thochakaka|thochakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochakafthaf|thochakafthaf]] || [[word:thochakafjaf|thochakafjaf]] || [[word:thochakafshaf|thochakafshaf]] || [[word:thochakafkaf|thochakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thochakasha|thochakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thochakshĂ«sha|thochakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thochakrosha|thochakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thochakmusha|thochakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thochakyasha|thochakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothochaknkshĂ«sha|gothochaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothochaknkrosha|gothochaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothochaknkmusha|gothochaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothochaknkyasha|gothochaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thochachakasha|thochachakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thochachakshĂ«sha|thochachakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thochachakrosha|thochachakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thochachakmusha|thochachakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thochachakyasha|thochachakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothochachaknkshĂ«sha|gothochachaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothochachaknkrosha|gothochachaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothochachaknkmusha|gothochachaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothochachaknkyasha|gothochachaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thechĂŠkasha|thechĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thechĂŠkshĂ«sha|thechĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thechĂŠkrosha|thechĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thechĂŠkmusha|thechĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thechĂŠkyasha|thechĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothechĂŠknkshĂ«sha|gothechĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothechĂŠknkrosha|gothechĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothechĂŠknkmusha|gothechĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothechĂŠknkyasha|gothechĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thochfakasha|thochfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thochfakshĂ«sha|thochfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thochfakrosha|thochfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thochfakmusha|thochfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thochfakyasha|thochfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothochfaknkshĂ«sha|gothochfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothochfaknkrosha|gothochfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothochfaknkmusha|gothochfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothochfaknkyasha|gothochfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
